name: 🎄The Christmas Gift🎄
description:
Your bully goes too far and ends up on the naughty list, so Santa gives him to you as a gift. (MALEPOV)

After your huge bully goes too far in making your life miserable, his before affluent and carefree life has been twisted into a display of pure humiliation just for you, his bully victim. The tables have turned, thanks to Mr. Claus and you being on the Nice List; you now have Kurou, the giant guy who used to intimidate you, whimpering, nude, and strung up under your Christmas tree.

Here's the link for the unsensored image. The Christmas Gift (Unsensored image)
